SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.caztor.swing

Class DefaultFeedHandler

java.lang.Object
me.kevinboone.caztor.swing.DefaultFeedHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
FeedHandler
public class DefaultFeedHandler extends Object implements FeedHandler
The main feed handler. This class is responsible for adding feeds, checking whether a URL is already in the feeds list, aggregating feeds into viewable pages, and raising the feed editor (which is just a file editor). See FeedHandler for definitions of the public methods.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addFeed(String displayName, URL uri)
    addFeed() returns true if a new feed is added.
    void
    addFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)
    The listener will receive update about the status of feed aggregation, as the aggregator runs.
    void
    cancelUpdate()
    Cancel any ongoing update, which may mean killing a thread.
    void
    editFeeds()
    Raise a file editor that targets the feeds file.
    int
    getFeedCount()
    Get the total number of feeds in our list.
    GemLink
    getFeedLink(int index)
    Get a specific feed by its index.
    static DefaultFeedHandler
    getInstance()
     
    boolean
    isInFeedList(URL uri)
    isInList() returns true if the URI is definitely in the feed list, and false if not, or uncertain.
    boolean
    isRunning()
    Returns true if the feed aggregator is running.
    void
    readFromFile()
    Read all the feeds from file, if the "fileWasUpdated" attribute is true, that is, if there is reason to think that we need to reload.
    void
    removeFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)
     
    void
    showFeeds()
    Show all the feeds by opening the feeds file -- which is just Gemtext -- in a new viewer window.
    void
    start()
    Start the feed aggregator (in the background).

  • Method Details

    • addFeedManagerStatusListener

      public void addFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)
      Description copied from interface: FeedHandler
      The listener will receive update about the status of feed aggregation, as the aggregator runs.
      Specified by:
      addFeedManagerStatusListener in interface FeedHandler

    • addFeed

      public boolean addFeed(String displayName, URL uri) throws IOException
      addFeed() returns true if a new feed is added. The only reason not to add the feed -- other than an exception -- is that the URI is already feeded.
      Specified by:
      addFeed in interface FeedHandler
      Throws:
      IOException

    • cancelUpdate

      public void cancelUpdate()
      Description copied from interface: FeedHandler
      Cancel any ongoing update, which may mean killing a thread.
      Specified by:
      cancelUpdate in interface FeedHandler

    • editFeeds

      public void editFeeds() throws IOException
      Raise a file editor that targets the feeds file.
      Specified by:
      editFeeds in interface FeedHandler
      Throws:
      IOException

    • getInstance

      public static DefaultFeedHandler getInstance()

    • getFeedCount

      public int getFeedCount()
      Description copied from interface: FeedHandler
      Get the total number of feeds in our list.
      Specified by:
      getFeedCount in interface FeedHandler

    • getFeedLink

      public GemLink getFeedLink(int index)
      Get a specific feed by its index. This method will throw an exception if index < 0 or > the size of the feed list. It should only called after a call to getFeedCount(), which will also reload from file if necessary.
      Specified by:
      getFeedLink in interface FeedHandler

    • isInFeedList

      public boolean isInFeedList(URL uri)
      isInList() returns true if the URI is definitely in the feed list, and false if not, or uncertain. This method throws no exceptions, so file-handling errors are quietly ignored.
      Specified by:
      isInFeedList in interface FeedHandler

    • isRunning

      public boolean isRunning()
      Description copied from interface: FeedHandler
      Returns true if the feed aggregator is running.
      Specified by:
      isRunning in interface FeedHandler

    • readFromFile

      public void readFromFile()
      Read all the feeds from file, if the "fileWasUpdated" attribute is true, that is, if there is reason to think that we need to reload.

    • removeFeedManagerStatusListener

      public void removeFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)
      Specified by:
      removeFeedManagerStatusListener in interface FeedHandler

    • start

      public void start()
      Description copied from interface: FeedHandler
      Start the feed aggregator (in the background).
      Specified by:
      start in interface FeedHandler

    • showFeeds

      public void showFeeds() throws IOException
      Show all the feeds by opening the feeds file -- which is just Gemtext -- in a new viewer window.
